title: Ores to Stone
description: Changes all ore models to stone/deepslate/bedrock (texture pack compatible)
body:
Replaces all ore models with stone/deepslate/netherrack, preventing coordinate leaks from ore patterns.

This texture pack is also compatible with any other rexture pack as it changes the model not the texture. (make sure it is near the top to ensure that the models are changed correctly)


Default minecraft textures:

![default minecraft textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S1hrIHl6/images/3cee3165934de64f85eae3e3d94047c67647363f.png)

Default minecraft textures with models replaced:

![default minecraft textures with models replaced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S1hrIHl6/images/29457d3fff4f7a514de06c1af18d261fd3ea922d.png)

Item models in the hotbar and inventory do not change:

![default minecraft textures with block models replaced but item models not](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S1hrIHl6/images/3ffe0cd59349e7b03fc7824863eac56755a17ba3.png)

[MS Painted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ms-painted) texture pack with models replaced:

![ms painted with models replaced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S1hrIHl6/images/eba378a4bbf6d87026b1e55190790f4f6ff0bdf2.png)
